title: Mobile app crash on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after launching on iOS 17 devices.

title: Add dark mode support
description: A native dark mode option would improve usability during nighttime.

title: Slow report generation
description: Generating PDF reports takes more than 15 seconds.

title: Google login support
description: Allow users to sign in using their Google accounts.

title: Broken search functionality
description: The search bar does not return relevant feedback results.

title: Improve dashboard performance
description: The analytics dashboard loads slowly with large datasets.

title: Export to Excel
description: Provide an option to export reports in Excel format.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: Notification emails are delivered several minutes late.

title: Profile picture upload fails
description: Uploading profile pictures larger than 5 MB always fails.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out after only ten minutes of inactivity.

title: Real-time notifications
description: Display new feedback instantly without refreshing the page.

title: Incorrect sentiment analysis
description: Positive comments are sometimes classified as negative.

title: Analytics graph not updating
description: Charts do not refresh after importing new feedback.

title: Better mobile responsiveness
description: The dashboard layout breaks on smaller mobile screens.

title: Password reset email missing
description: Some users never receive password reset emails.

title: Filter by rating
description: Allow filtering feedback based on star ratings.

title: Bulk delete feedback
description: Administrators should be able to delete multiple records at once.

title: Duplicate feedback issue
description: Submitting the form twice creates duplicate entries.

title: CSV upload is slow
description: Uploading large CSV files takes too much time.

title: Improve accessibility
description: Increase color contrast for visually impaired users.

title: Notification badge incorrect
description: Unread notification count is sometimes inaccurate.

title: Auto-save feedback draft
description: Save unfinished feedback automatically while typing.

title: Support multiple languages
description: Provide localization for multiple languages.

title: Dashboard widgets customizable
description: Allow users to rearrange dashboard widgets.

title: Comment editing feature
description: Users should be able to edit their submitted feedback.

title: Feedback sorting options
description: Allow sorting feedback by newest oldest and highest rating.

title: API response timeout
description: The feedback API occasionally times out during peak hours.

title: Loading spinner improvement
description: Replace the current loading spinner with a smoother animation.

title: Keyboard shortcuts
description: Provide keyboard shortcuts for common dashboard actions.

title: Excellent user experience
description: The interface is intuitive clean and easy to navigate.
